metadata.description: Dynamics 365 Finance and Operations X++ plugin for Cursor — Microsoft-aligned extensibility, CoC, batch, security, forms, SysTest, and lifecycle automation for Ax* projects.

plugins.name: xpp-fno
plugins.description: F&O X++ development kit: 12 skills (59+ atomic rules), 10 Ax* guardrail rules, 4 agents (plan, implement, review, debug), 6 slash commands, and hooks for session context, write hints, and implementer→reviewer chaining. Extensions-only — not AX 2012 or Business Central.
